programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: For centuries, farmers have been discovering strange, complex geometric patterns comprised of rings, circles and other intricate shapes in their fields.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Two victims of alleged electronic harassment and organized gang-stalking recount their horrible ordeals. Richard investigates possible theories as to who is behind this program and why.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Execution of MLK and The Framing of James Earl Ray
programme.desc: In this re-examination of the assassination of civil rights leader Martin Luther King, Richard meets several researchers who provide evidence that the convicted gunman, James Earl Ray was not the real triggerman.

programme.title: UFOTV Presents: The Afterlife Investigations
programme.desc: Narrated by Britain's leading investigative Journalist - Donal MacIntyre - this award winning film presents four never before seen scientific investigations into life after death.

programme.title: UFOTV Presents: The Mysterious Stone Monuments of Markawasi Peru
programme.desc: Travel high into the Peruvian Andes to explore the strange, wondrous and unexplained mysteries of stone formations that may have been carved by thousands of years of erosion -- or the hands of a long-dead civilization

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside The ROM, Toronto
programme.desc: From a medieval hand-grenade to an extremely rare dinosaur, discover the secrets inside the Royal Ontario Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Vatican
programme.desc: From Michelangelo’s Sistine Chapel frescoes to the fall of the Knights Templar, discover the secrets inside the Vatican Museums.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Pergamon and Neues Museums, Berlin
programme.desc: From Vikings who break unbreakable swords to curators who solve the world’s hardest jigsaw puzzle, discover the secrets inside the Pergamon and Neues Museums.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Egyptian Museum
programme.desc: From the mystery of a Pharaoh’s gold to the strange practice of animal mummification, discover the secrets inside the Egyptian Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the National Archeological Museum of Athens
programme.desc: From a dodgy archeologist who discovers a golden mask to an ancient gadget that reveals the future, discover the secrets inside the National Archaeological Museum.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: TORNADO
programme.desc: A tornado is a violently rotating column of air extending from the base of a thunderstorm down to the ground. Tornadoes are capable of completely destroying well-made structures, uprooting trees, and hurling objects through the air like deadly missiles.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: VOLCANOES
programme.desc: Volcanoes are Earth’s geologic architects. They’ve created more than 80 percent of our planet’s surface and their explosive force has crafted both mountains and craters.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: MANMADE
programme.desc: When it comes to disasters, mother nature has mankind beat. However, as mankind expands, evolves and technology advances, it comes with dangerous challenges. When errors are made or unforeseen circumstances occur, the results can be devastating.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Wild Water
programme.desc: In this episode, George investigates the wild side of water in dangerous class 5 river rapids, a flooded cave, and even in the ocean surrounded by massive Great White Sharks.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Thunder Down Under
programme.desc: In Australia George teams up with storm chaser Jimmy Deguara to witness summer storms in the outback. While in Oz, he dives the magnificent Great Barrier Reef, and explores just how painful is the sting of the venomous Box Jellyfish.

programme.title: Angry Planet: West Coast Winter Weather
programme.desc: On Canada's rugged West Coast, George ice-climbs a frozen waterfall, uses ski-skins to climb Mt.Garibaldi to an alpine lake, visits a storm-watching lodge on British Columbia's Long Beach, home of winter surfing and massive Pacific storms.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Venezuela Lightning
programme.desc: Gas from Catatumbo swamps mixed with cold air from the Andes create a perpetual lightning storm on South America's largest lake. From here George canoes 84 km to world's highest waterfall, swims with piranhas and holds a huge Anaconda.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Slingshot
programme.desc: Sending probes throughout the solar system is a mathematicians dream and an engineers nightmare, sling shotting probes around other planets to arrive at their destination.

programme.title: The New Frontier: GIANTS IN THE DARK
programme.desc: Asteroids, the debris from the early solar system hold tantalizing clues to planetary formation. The spacecraft Psyche readies to study a unique metallic asteroid.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Stars Above
programme.desc: Stars are a bit like human beings. They can be warm or cold, they come in all kinds of shapes and sizes.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Exo Planeta
programme.desc: As scientists and astronomers peer closer at nearby stars with ever more fidelity they are discovering planets; exo planets, worlds outside our own solar system.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Flight Status
programme.desc: The latest updates on the new space hardware about to launch us into the next generation of space flight some rockets and capsules are on time others not so fortunate.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Getting There
programme.desc: Launching payloads into space is a very difficult task, historically rocket launches are the proverbial 'swords into ploughshares'.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Danger, Astreroids Ahead
programme.desc: The question often rises is the cost of space exploration really worth it? Could the money be better spent elsewhere.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Cosmic Collisions
programme.desc: Cosmic and x rays, these mysterious and highly powerful particles from deep space are being investigated to finally discover where they come from.

programme.title: The New Frontier: The Inner Worlds
programme.desc: They orbit between us and our Star, the inner worlds; hidden within the sun's glare often only visible at sunrise or sunset.

programme.title: The New Frontier: First Light
programme.desc: For an instrument first developed as recently as the 17th century, the telescope has travelled a long way.

programme.title: Warship: Life at Sea: Episode 3

programme.title: Warship: Life at Sea: Episode 4

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown

programme.desc: Tony heads back to his much-beloved Salvador, Brazil. The ever-present street festivals and the famous Carnival parade begin with sitting down with a local artist in the streets of the historic Pelo.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Dummy Disaster/Francine and The Feline
programme.desc: When painfully shy George brings a ventriloquist dummy to school, a popular kid is born! Then, Arthur thinks the best pet to have is a dog, and Francine probably would have agreed--that is, until little Nemo, a cute kitten, came along.

programme.title: Arthur: Francine's Big Top Trouble/George Blows His Top
programme.desc: Francine is sure she will be a star at circus camp. How hard could it be? Then, George is always more than happy to lend his pals whatever they need. But Buster's borrowing gets out of control.

programme.title: Arthur: Mom and Dad Have A Great Big Fight/D.W.'s Perfect Wish
programme.desc: When Mom and Dad fight over spilled milk, Arthur and D.W. fear the worst. Is it Arthur's fault or D.W.'s? Then, turning five is a major, big deal event! But D.W. worries that she fribbled away her preschool years on meaningless pursuits.

programme.title: Arthur: Fern and the Case of the Stolen Story/Sue Ellen Vegges Out
programme.desc: Fern has writer's block! Fortunately, Ladonna's full of stories, and Fern decides to "borrow" the tales and simply change the names. Then, when Sue Ellen decides to stop eating meat, Muffy and Francine compete to be the best vegetarian.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Tooth/D.W. Gets Lost
programme.desc: It's bad enough to wear glasses all the time. But does Arthur have to be the last person in his class to lose his baby teeth? Then, if you think being lost in a humongous department store would scare a four-year-old, think again.

programme.title: Arthur: D.W. Thinks Big/Arthur Cleans Up
programme.desc: Once again, Arthur gets to do everything. Mostly he gets to carry the ring in Aunt Lucy's wedding. Elwood City's park is in sad shape, and after grumbling about it, the kids find themselves volunteered to clean it up.

programme.title: Arthur: Hide And Snake/Muffy's New Best Friend
programme.desc: The kids capture a snake and learn that it's possibly poisonous--after it gets lost in Arthur's house! Why is Muffy interviewing for a new best friend? She and Francine are usually inseparable, but lately it seems they have less in common.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Read: Super Saver!/Tibbles to the Rescue!
programme.desc: Business is slow for Mr. and Mrs. Read, and Arthur is concerned. Can he find ways to keep his family in the green? When D.W. saves Tommy and Timmy from a nasty fall, they decide to repay the favor…whether D.W. likes it or not.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Makes Waves/It Came From Beyond
programme.desc: With the community pool closed for repairs and the temperature on the rise, Arthur and D.W. need a place to keep cool. Then, Grandma Thora takes in a stray: an adorable little dog named...Killer?

programme.desc: On June 6th 1944, Lieutenant-colonel Rudder’s Rangers company climbs the cliffs of the Pointe du Hoc in Normandy with the mission to destroy the German cannons.

programme.title: War Wrecks: The Untold Stories: The Tragic Sinking of Leopoldville

programme.title: Warbirds of WWII
programme.desc: Part 1 - Key planes of the Luftwaffe in WW2 included the Messerschmitt Bf 109, a versatile and widely used fighter; the Focke-Wulf Fw 190, known for its firepower and agility; and the Junkers Ju 87 Stuka, a prominent dive bomber.

programme.title: Warbirds of WWII
programme.desc: Part 2 - Key planes of the Luftwaffe in WW2 included the Messerschmitt Bf 109, a versatile and widely used fighter; the Focke-Wulf Fw 190, known for its firepower and agility; and the Junkers Ju 87 Stuka, a prominent dive bomber.

programme.title: Warbirds of WWII

programme.title: Warbirds of WWII
programme.desc: Part 2 - Major planes of the Japanese Empire in WW2 included the Mitsubishi A6M Zero, a highly maneuverable fighter; the Nakajima Ki-43 Hayabusa, another used fighter; and the Mitsubishi G4M Betty, a long-range bomber utilized for strategic missions.

programme.title: WWII Air Crash Detectives

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Married to Medicine

programme.title: Married to Medicine

programme.title: Married to Medicine
programme.desc: Things continue to heat up at the crab boil when Heavenly and Mariah's feud reaches a fever pitch; Quad opens up to the group; Contessa has a conversation with her father about a life-altering decision; Dr. K encourages Heavenly to dig into her past.

programme.title: Married to Medicine
programme.desc: Quad has a heart-to-heart conversation with Jackie over her marital issues; the guys have a much-needed night to themselves during which Greg tells his side of the story; with Simone and Jackie in tow, Heavenly travels to her childhood home in Miami.

programme.title: Married to Medicine
programme.desc: Heavenly continues her spiritual journey in Miami; Contessa goes through with her double mastectomy; Quad turns to old friends for comfort; Toya and Eugene appreciate the progress of their dream home; Mariah and Aydin explain the birds and the bees.

programme.title: Married to Medicine
programme.desc: Simone welcomes her son home from college; Contessa recuperates from her prophylactic mastectomy; Jarrett invites all the ladies to her new home for a housewarming party; Quad debates revealing her big news to the ladies.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Luis tries to figure out what's been confusing him lately while hoping to land a building on Park Avenue South; Ryan goes after the one listing that got away from him; Ryan shows up at Fredrik's launch party.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York: Ryan's Wedding
programme.desc: Ryan and Emilia deal with complications while planning their wedding, which will take place in Greece; Ryan is preoccupied with his new building in Greenpoint, while Emilia is overwhelmed with her growing to-do list.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York: Ryan's Wedding
programme.desc: Ryan's work interferes with the wedding planning, and he begins to realize if he doesn't make a change, he will lose Emilia forever.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York: Ryan's Wedding
programme.desc: As Ryan scrambles to find a vacation house in Greece, the wedding plans start to fall apart; the guest list balloons, the venue experiences booking issues and Ryan's bachelor party doesn't go as planned; Luis plans a night Ryan will never forget.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York: Ryan's Wedding
programme.desc: With two days to go before Ryan and Emilia's wedding, the church calls with heart-stopping news, and when Emilia looks for Ryan to help solve the problem, he's on the opposite side of the island.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: With a bar full of customers, a couple of twenty-somethings battle with a dodgy pizza oven, a Menorcan diving school is left high and dry as their boat breaks down, and two gite owners in France receive a surprise glamorous booking.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: After 20 months of renovations, two gite owners open for business in France, a Menorcan diving school deals with a very nervous customer, and there’s a life changing event for two young bar owners on the Costa del Sol.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: At the end of the season, there’s a chance to earn big money for a horse riding school in Spain, a jaw dropping surprise for a French gite owner, and a family counts the cost of running a diving school in Menorca.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A young couple decide to bring an alternative lifestyle to rural France. Entrepreneurs from Leicester find a new way to make cash in Spain. And an artist and a chef combine their passions to offer a new kind of holiday in the South of France.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: Bed & breakfast owners in France have plumbing problems. A Leicester couple’s café kitchen in Spain is complete, but their first service is chaos. And in France, a couple from Bath attempt to keep their guests cool in the middle of a heatwave.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Revenge of the Fly

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Atlantis Awakes
programme.desc: The Turtles join forces with Merdude, a strange fish-creature, and journey with him to the fabulous underwater city of Atlantis.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Cyber-Turtles

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: A woman mistakenly has her ball switched for a real croquet ball that kills a Parliament member.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes

programme.desc: Holmes and Watson travel to Sussex to investigate the murder of Squire Douglas, who was shot to death in a sealed-up castle, with only two apparent suspects.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: A cowgirl from a visiting rodeo show asks Sherlock Holmes to help her when she discovers a dead man in her hotel room.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Sherlock Holmes helps to track down a killer who leaves clues next to the women he kills.

programme.desc: Trouble brews in the Red team, with Amber questioning their choice of head chef. The challenge sees the teams tackling a reception for newlyweds, before a difficult service.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The chefs pair up and taste dishes containing both a land and sea element; the team who identifies all proteins correctly, with the fastest time, wins.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Where's Grandad?

programme.title: Sensing Murder

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Anna and Stuart head to the home of a former soldier who has fallen down some stairs and has a potential spinal injury. Jo and Laura treat a teenage boy having a seizure at college.

programme.title: UFOTV Presents: The Mysterious Stone Monuments of Markawasi Peru
programme.desc: Travel high into the Peruvian Andes to explore the strange, wondrous and unexplained mysteries of stone formations that may have been carved by thousands of years of erosion -- or the hands of a long-dead civilization

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: MYSTERIOUS CREATURES
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries examines mysterious creatures that may live in Earth including the chupacabra, the Loch Ness Monster, the thunderbird,) the yeti or Bigfoot.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: SECRET TECHNOLOGIES
programme.desc: Scientists, engineers, military, and intelligence agencies push boundaries with unlimited budgets and secrecy. This episode unveils known (or suspected) top-secret projects.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: EXTRA TERRESTRIAL
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries explores extraterrestrial phenomena like ship and aircraft vanishings, Area 51, close encounters, classified projects.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: PLACES WITH HEALING POWERS
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at places that are said to have healing power including Lourdes where people have been cured by drinking water from a cave, Machu Picchu, Stonehenge, the Dead Sea, the Ganges.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: RELICS OF THE SAINT
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at the relics of the saints including the Shrine of the Three Kings, the Tilman of Our Lady of Guadalupe, the Holy Foreskin, the Ark of the Covenant, the Remain of Mary Magdalene, Buddha's Tooth, and the Holy Grail.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: SECRETS AND MAGIC OF ALTERNATIVE MEDICINE
programme.desc: In this episode, we dive into untraditional healing and its mysteries, challenging conventional Western medicine. Explore alternative medical miracles that will captivate you.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: MYSTERIOUS TEXTS
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at mysteries related to ancient texts including the Egyptian Book of the Dead, the Torah, the Secrets of Fulcanelli, the Tao Te Ching, the Vedas.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: SECRET PROJECTS AND OPERATIONS
programme.desc: Imagine a world with open use of resources from secret government projects. Little is known about these black ops. They hold mysteries and consequences, challenging democratic ideals. History reveals human experimentation, contrary to official claims.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the National Archeological Museum of Athens
programme.desc: From a dodgy archeologist who discovers a golden mask to an ancient gadget that reveals the future, discover the secrets inside the National Archaeological Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the State Hermitage Museum
programme.desc: From ancient mummies who sport tattoos to re-examining who really killed Rasputin, discover the secrets inside the State Hermitage Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Natural History Museum, London
programme.desc: From Darwin’s original specimens to a lost workshop that inspired James Bond, discover the secrets of Britain’s Natural History Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Imperial War Museum, London
programme.desc: From Churchill risking his life in the Blitz to 21st Century soldiers who become invisible, discover the secrets inside the Imperial War Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Topkapi Palace Museum, Istanbul
programme.desc: From assassins who plot to poison a Sultan to bitter enemies who sign the world’s first peace treaty, discover the secrets inside the Topkapi Palace Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the American Museum of Natural History, New York
programme.desc: From a dinosaur embryo that solves a murder mystery to a spacecraft catching a comet’s tail, discover the secrets inside the American Museum of Natural History.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Venezuela Lightning
programme.desc: Gas from Catatumbo swamps mixed with cold air from the Andes create a perpetual lightning storm on South America's largest lake. From here George canoes 84 km to world's highest waterfall, swims with piranhas and holds a huge Anaconda.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Volcanic Wedding
programme.desc: Most people's idea of a dream wedding might include a horse drawn carriage and an elaborate ceremony. Not George. Join him as he and his bride to be tie the knot in an unusual and certainly exotic way.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Timbuktu: Birthplace of Hurricanes
programme.desc: Dust storms can spin off from Africa into the Atlantic and morph into tropical hurricanes that threaten the Caribbean and USA. While searching for Timbuktu's dust storms, George finds adventure in the landscape and culture of West Africa.

programme.title: Naked Science: The Great Flood
programme.desc: Almost every culture on Earth tells the story of an ancient flood – details vary but the basic plot is the same - An angry God wipes out an unrepentant population.

programme.title: Naked Science: How To Avert an Asteroid Impact
programme.desc: Throughout history, the earth has been bombarded from space. Asteroid impacts have caused mass extinctions – including the dinosaur wipe out.

programme.title: Naked Science: Great Lakes
programme.desc: The Great Lakes are sometimes referred to as inland seas; they are the largest freshwater system in the world. Naked Science examines the early history of these amazing bodies

programme.title: Naked Science: Snowball Earth
programme.desc: There is a theory that scientists once dismissed as absurd - that long ago the Earth became so cold every inch of it was entombed in ice.

programme.title: The New Frontier: First Light

programme.title: The New Frontier: INCREASING ORBIT
programme.desc: The ISS is the workhorse of the international spacefaring community, but its days are numbered. R

programme.title: The New Frontier: PEERING INTO THE ABYSS

programme.title: The New Frontier: Heavy Lift

programme.title: The New Frontier: Next Stop Mars

programme.title: The New Frontier: The Moons of Olympis

programme.title: The New Frontier: The Ice Giants
programme.desc: Beyond the asteroid belt lay the ice giants, some can be seen with the naked eye, others only glimpsed once by a passing probe.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Gravity
programme.desc: LISA pathfinder, has led the way for a space based gravity wave detector, what are gravity waves and why are they so hard to detect?

programme.desc: Teneal and Richard are telling different tales, each alleging the other is unfit to parent! The truth will come down to a lie detector test, and the results will be shocking!

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Sherlock Holmes helps to track down a killer who leaves clues next to the women he kills.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Sherlock Holmes and Dr. Watson treat an injured man after a fierce encounter that he barely escapes.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: The detectives create a plan to trap a killer before he murders his 7th wife.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes: The Case of the Baker Street Bachelors
programme.desc: A political leader is being blackmailed, and to find the blackmailers, Holmes and Watson join a marriage bureau. However, things don't go quite as planned, and Holmes winds up getting arrested and thrown in jail.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes: The Case of the Diamond Tooth
programme.desc: While walking along the banks of the River Thames, Watson finds a diamond tooth. The article takes on more meaning later, however, when Holmes learns that the body of a murder victim had been discovered near where Watson found the tooth.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes: The Case of the Haunted Gainsborough
programme.desc: Malcolm MacGregan will lose his family's Scottish castle if he can't make the mortgage payment, by midnight.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes: The Case of the Exhumed Client
programme.desc: Sir Charles Farnsworth is found dead in his mysterious Farnsworth Castle. It turns out that Farnsworth had a clause inserted in this will that his death, no matter what the apparent cause, would be investigated by Sherlock Holmes.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Sherlock Holmes examines an odd story told to him by a member of the 'League of Red-Headed Men'.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Back at Hell's Kitchen, the chefs receive a surprise phone call from Chef Ramsay saying that there is no dinner service, but someone will be going home.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: It's time for the iconic Blind Taste Test. The winners enjoy a helicopter ride, while punishment awaits the losers. Both teams struggle during service, but who will be sent home?

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: With eight chefs left in the team challenge, the red and blue team are each responsible for creating five different burgers: beef, chicken, lamb, salmon and turkey.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The chefs compete in the inaugural 'Spell's Kitchen' word scramble challenge and cook-off; HK is closed to the public and hosts a multi-course meal for charity.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Back at Hell's Kitchen, the chefs will compete in three difficult challenges to prove if they are worthy of a Black Jacket.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: In the first challenge with all black jackets, the chefs will be competing to make a unique dish with ingredients appearing along the way.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: A Mother's Worst Nightmare
programme.desc: Otautau toddler Amber-Lee, aged two and a half, vanished from Kingston at the southern tip of Lake Wakatipu on October 17, 1992.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Last Orders
programme.desc: In 1993, devoted father Kevin O'Loughlin came face to face with the dark side of sunny Nelson when he was brutally stabbed to death after a night out on the town.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Without Warning
programme.desc: This week’s episode of Sensing Murder promises greater co-operation between psychics and police, attempting to uncover the truth about the death of 18-year-old apprentice plumber Regan O’Donoghue, who was killed in a hit and run in 2007.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Vanishing Point
programme.desc: In 2003, 32-year-old mother of three Sara Neithe vanished from the Hauraki Plains. Neither Sara nor her car have been seen since. Police suspect that Sara has been murdered but without a crime scene, they have been unable to advance the case.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: The Lie of the Land
programme.desc: Sue Nicholson and Deb Webber investigate one of the most complex and intriguing cases ever featured - did Waikato man Jason Dark commit suicide or was he murdered, as his family believes?

programme.title: Sensing Murder: When The Trail Goes Cold
programme.desc: This episodes involves the disappearance of 62-year-old Kaye Stewart, a woman who went missing while on a short walk on June 13th, 2005.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Knights of the Living Dead
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Worcester, Massachusetts to investigate the Higgins Armory, the only armory in the western hemisphere devoted to arms and armor.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: A Soldier's Story
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, Tapsheads to Derby, Connecticut to investigate one of the country's oldest Opera houses, the Sterling Opera House.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Pearl Harbor Phantoms
programme.desc: For the first time ever, TAPS travels to Hawaii to explore one of America's most sacred settings, Pearl Harbor. They are joined in their investigation of the Pacific Aviation Museum by Destination Truth's Josh Gates.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Urgent!
programme.desc: We pick were we last left off, in Hawaii, for the reveal. Jason and Grant were called back for a very important personal case, the Reid House, in Rhode Island, to help a scared 4 year old.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Hill View Manor

programme.title: Paranormal State: Man of the House

programme.title: Paranormal State: Shadow Caster
programme.desc: PRS investigates an Alabama home where clients, Georgiana and her two daughters, are so terrified, they moved out after only 18 months. They have seen shadow figures, been touched and have a recorded EVP stating, "Look at me, get out of here."

programme.title: Paranormal State: Satan's Soldier
programme.desc: Mark and Kim can't sleep through the racket caused by unseen forces in their central Indiana home. When PRS and Psychic/Medium Michelle Belanger discover what appears to be blood in the basement, they investigate a history of violence in the home.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Dark Practice
programme.desc: Brenda is terrified by a dark hooded figure spotted in her West Virginia home. The same entity allegedly tormented her late husband. PRS and Psychic/Medium Michelle Belanger help Brenda before she slips into the same abyss as her late husband.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Haunted Ranch
programme.desc: PRS saddles up to a remote ranch in Hunt, Texas where black shadows are being spotted and animals harmed. What's more, a mysterious crop circle has formed on the property and the horses refuse to cross it.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Paranormal Detour
programme.desc: With time off between cases, Ryan suggests to the PRS team they choose a random town to investigate. They roll into St. Helens, Oregon, home of Twilight, where they learn about the long history of the paranormal in the area.

programme.title: Paranormal State: First Contact
programme.desc: Washington State, a hotbed of unexplained paranormal activity. Between possible UFOs in the sky and winged creatures in the woods, Ryan and his team are forced to face their fears and deal with the question: Are we truly alone in the universe?

programme.title: Paranormal State: Church of the Damned

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Fire

programme.desc: 1870s French Jarre Dolne Knuckle Duster revolver-knife-brass knuckle combo, a rare original George Rodrigue "Blue Dog" screenprint and a 1980 autographed Raging Bull movie poster.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gangster Whiskey
programme.desc: Allen and Ton trek to an auction in Moreno Valley, CA, where two locker wins yield a vintage jukebox, a valuable baseball card and a Prohibition-era moonshine still.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Whip It Good
programme.desc: With a motocross bike and a rare stock whip up for grabs, Ton and Allen face one of their toughest competitors yet: their former employee Carolyn, who knows all their tricks, has money to burn and is out for revenge.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Got a Gun

programme.desc: Mint 1800s French "Harmonica Pistol" and a collection of '90s remote controlled combat robots.

programme.desc: The investigation into the brutal murder of a kind-hearted single mother points to three suspects, all claiming innocence.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions

programme.title: Criminal Confessions

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: After a divorced mother is found murdered in her home, the police investigate and discover that she had rather an unusual array of people involved in her life.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: When a single mother with a history of heart problems is found dead, detectives assume she died of natural causes. But as the investigation deepens, detectives begin to believe foul play was involved.

programme.desc: Maria Sanutti-Spencer revelled in her dad Rocco’s criminal past, and threatened violent retribution for anyone who crossed her. As her marriage broke down, her husband, Frank, saw first-hand what Maria and her father were capable of.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Claire and Andrew Tavener were a sociable couple. But when Andrew drank, he became paranoid and possessive. So when he threatened to kill his 'cheating' wife, his friends wrote it off as the rambling of a drunk.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Dallas Augustine had a rocky start in life, including a famous mother cut down in her prime by a murderous husband. Then, when she met Jessie McCaskill, it seemed her life had fallen into place. But their marriage soon descended into violence.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Jessica was swept off her feet by businessman Sonny. He totally adored her and her daughter, but adoration soon turned to jealousy and controlling behaviour. When she finally tried to leave him, it ended in two brutal murders.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Tom and Kelley Clayton were an alpha couple: attractive, athletic, popular. Drawn to the professional hockey player’s bad boy reputation, she would later discover just how bad her cheating, scheming husband really was.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Debbie Griggs had three young kids, and was pregnant with her fourth. But she believed husband Andrew was sleeping with a teenage girl, and had threatened divorce. That’s when she went missing, and it would take cops 20 years to uncover the truth.

programme.title: 72 Hours: The Great Despisers
programme.desc: A 19 year old man comes home one night to discover that his family had all been savagely murdered. Could it be the insurance money and a movie called "The Great Despisers" that motivated the killers to perpetrate such violence?

programme.title: 72 Hours: Cold Hit
programme.desc: In 1994, a troubled single mother is found raped and murdered in her apartment. Was it one of the volatile men in her life? All possible suspects are eliminated and the case goes cold for three years, until a nine-year old girl is brutally raped.

programme.desc: A dead woman is found in a park. It’s learned the deceased is a divorced landlady of a group home for transients. The suspect list is long; the clues to follow are few.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Murder on Campus

programme.title: 72 Hours: The Violinist
programme.desc: Surgically clean body parts start turning up on a highway. Stranger still, they have been drained of every drop of blood.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Kidnapped

programme.title: 72 Hours: Sweet Killer
programme.desc: An aging hippy is going through bad times. When he's found dead in his home with a gut of antifreeze, it's a closed case. Then a shocking confession reveals a maelstrom of lies and a story of cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Masquerading as German workers, Hogan and the crew have made elaborate and foolproof plans to blow a German cannon factory sky-high - but their plan backfires when Newkirk winds up being drafted into the German army.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: When an important Third Reich official wants to defect, Hogan brings him to Stalag 13 - and convinces Col. Klink that the fugitive is Adolf Hitler in disguise...who is trying to elude assassins by hiding at the camp.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: In using Schultz to deliver radio parts to the underground, Hogan causes a marital tiff, which, to fix, requires getting Klink to believe that his sergeant is dying from premature old age.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: While awaiting word to complete a sabotage mission, Stalag 13 gets a new officer under Klink - Burkhalter's alert brother-in-law, who enjoys tormenting prisoners.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: When Hochstetter works to lower a French pilot's resistance to interrogation, Hogan brings the man's fiancee to camp to have Klink marry them.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: The presence of a masterful escape-artist POW threatens to destabilize Hogan's set-up at Stalag 13.

programme.desc: After a year and a half of chatting with her online, Tyler thinks he may have a future with Amanda. But are Tyler's friends correct because they suspect that something isn't right?

programme.desc: Euronews offers a unique perspective on world events. It empowers people to make up their own mind by delivering factual analysis and a diversity of viewpoints. Because all views matter, Euronews is "All Views".

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: SECRET PROJECTS AND OPERATIONS
programme.desc: Imagine a world with open use of resources from secret government projects. Little is known about these black ops. They hold mysteries and consequences, challenging democratic ideals. History reveals human experimentation, contrary to official claims.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: HUMAN SACRIFICES
programme.desc: Human sacrifice, practiced since the Paleolithic era, was seen as a gift to gods for cosmic order. Found in black magic, voodoo, and Satanism, these rituals may hint at a mysterious connection to higher forces.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: UNEXPLAINED MESSAGES
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at mysterious unexplained messages from the past including the Nazca Lines, the Voynich Manuscript, the Flower of Life, Puma Punku, Leonardo Da Vinci's paintings.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: ANCIENT MEGASTRUCTURES
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at ancient megastructures including the Olmec Heads of Central America, Moai of Eastern Island, Petra in modern day Jordan, the Alhambra in Spain, Angkor Wat in Cambodia, Chichen Itza.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: MYSTERIES OF HIDDEN ROOMS
programme.desc: Throughout history, humanity has been captivated by hidden places—rooms, passages, and chambers. Whether for escape or sinister motives, these ten notable hidden spaces span the ages, revealing intrigue and mystery.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: PEOPLE WITHOUT IDENTITY
programme.desc: 10 Mysterious Figures: Individuals who emerged from obscurity, made their mark on history, then vanished without a trace. Their identities remain unconfirmed, shrouding them in mystery.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: NATURE’S MAGIC
programme.desc: Natural sites worldwide hold spiritual significance for civilizations, from ancient rituals to modern reverence, each crackling with unique energy and a hint of magic.

programme.title: Top 10: Secrets and Mysteries: MYSTERIOUS AND UNSOLVED DISSAPEARANCES
programme.desc: Legally declared dead, bodies never found. Disappearances spark speculation, media attention, and unanswered questions. Where did they go?

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the American Museum of Natural History, New York
programme.desc: From a dinosaur embryo that solves a murder mystery to a spacecraft catching a comet’s tail, discover the secrets inside the American Museum of Natural History.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Louvre
programme.desc: From murdered kings to stolen masterpieces, discover the secrets inside the Louvre.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Palacio Real, Madrid
programme.desc: From a clock that runs on witchcraft to a 21st Century king who outfoxes a fascist, discover the secrets inside the Palacio Real.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Kunsthistorisches Museum, Vienna
programme.desc: From the alchemy of turning silver into gold to a dance craze that changed history, discover the secrets inside the Kunsthistorisches Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Israel Museum, Jerusalem
programme.desc: From a scientist who recreates the crucifixion to an ancient amulet that proves Star Trek's Spock is Jewish, discover the secrets inside the Israel Museum.

programme.title: Naked Science: Snowball Earth
programme.desc: There is a theory that scientists once dismissed as absurd - that long ago the Earth became so cold every inch of it was entombed in ice.

programme.title: Naked Science: What's Wrong With Pluto
programme.desc: Naked Science investigates the violent cosmological forces that create planets and discover what it is that makes a planet a planet.

programme.title: Naked Science: Saturn
programme.desc: Saturn is the second-largest planet in the solar system. Storms on this gas giant can cover an area bigger than the United States Clouds of the gas race around the planet at over 1000 miles per hour generating fierce electrical storms and lightning.

programme.title: Naked Science: How To Destroy A Planet
programme.desc: The Earth is built to last. It is a 4,550,000,000-year-old, 5,973,600,000,000,000,000,000-tonne ball of rock and iron. It has taken more devastating asteroid hits in its lifetime than you've had hot dinners, and it still orbits happily around the sun.

programme.title: Naked Science: Venus
programme.desc: Earth has an evil twin. Venus. It is shrouded in a lethal atmosphere of carbon dioxide and acid rain. The surface temperature is hot enough to melt lead and the pressure high enough to crush a nuclear submarine.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Gravity
programme.desc: LISA pathfinder, has led the way for a space based gravity wave detector, what are gravity waves and why are they so hard to detect?

programme.title: The New Frontier: THE NEXT BIG LEAPS
programme.desc: Projects in the works. SunRISE, SPHEREx, NEOS and others, their mission to expand our knowledge of Earth, the surrounding space, Dark Matter, and the earliest galaxies. N

programme.title: The New Frontier: Shore To Shore
programme.desc: Our seafaring nature has translated well to the space age, seeking to sail out into the unknown in search of riches of one kind or another.

programme.title: The New Frontier: WEBB OF LIFE
programme.desc: The James Webb Space Telescope is now operational. Launched aboard an Arianne 5 the 10-billion-dollar spacecraft has deployed successfully and reached its orbit around the Sun.

programme.title: The New Frontier: OCEANS IN THE SKY
programme.desc: Juice and the Europa Clipper are two missions to our Solar System’s largest planet.

programme.title: STAR LIGHT, STAR BRIGHT
programme.desc: The two current science missions to our star; the sun have made great leaps forward in the science of how stars work, how they generate solar winds and how they affect their orbiting planets

programme.title: The New Frontier: Mercury Or Bust
programme.desc: The ESA - JAXA joint Bepi-Colombo Mission is moments away from launch.

programme.title: The New Frontier: The Dark Side
programme.desc: Perhaps that American politician was right. There are indeed things we know we don’t know.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Emissaries
programme.desc: Our solar system is vast, from our own star the Sun to Earth is nearly 150 million kilometers or 1 Astronomical Unit.

programme.title: EARTH´S EVIL TWIN
programme.desc: Venus is a planet closest to Earth in distance and size, it once may have been as hospitable to life as Earth is now. Then something changed and Venus became shrouded in hot dense toxic clouds.

programme.title: Arthur: Fifteen
programme.desc: How much can Arthur and his friends do in 15 minutes? Can they all accomplish these missions impossible before the clock counts all the way down? Only time will tell!

programme.title: Arthur: How The Cookie Crumbles/Sue Ellen's Littler Sister

programme.title: Arthur: Brain's Brain/Brain Sees Stars

programme.title: Arthur: D.W., All Fired Up/I'd Rather Read It Myself
programme.desc: When Ms. Morgan announces they'll be having a fire drill during preschool, D.W. wants no part of it--it sounds way too scary. Then, the Tibble Twins are better than D.W. at just about everything.

programme.title: Arthur: Portrait of the Artist as a Young Tibble/The Secret Guardians
programme.desc: The Tibble Twins start a new business to earn enough money to buy the coveted Krummy Kreepy Kastle. When and friends stumble upon a beautiful woodland oasis right by their homes, they vow to tell no one and keep it as their secret spot.

programme.title: Arthur: D.W., The Picky Eater/Buster And The Daredevils

programme.title: Arthur: Francine Redecorates/Arthur The Loser

programme.title: Arthur: The Election/Francine Goes To War
programme.desc: There’s a mock election in Mr. Ratburn's class, but Muffy takes it seriously. How far will she go to win? Francine can't believe it. She gets in trouble no matter what she does -- thanks to the new nosy next-door neighbor!

programme.title: Warbirds of WWII

programme.title: Hitler Uncovering His Fatal Obsession: Barbarossa Unleased 1941
programme.desc: E1 begins with a brief examination of the rationale of hatred projected by Hitler onto the Soviet-Slavic-Jewish world. Then it leaps forward, to see Hitler initiate an invasion of the USSR.

programme.title: Hitler Uncovering His Fatal Obsession: Time is Blood 1942-5
programme.desc: Episode 2 begins after the desperate German winter of 1941. Yet 1942 began badly for the Soviets, with more vicious Nazi campaigning seeing millions more Russians captured and starved.

programme.title: Hitler and Stalin: A Secret Relationship: Mistrust and Mutual Fascination

programme.title: Hitler and Stalin: A Secret Relationship: Two Tyrants

programme.title: Secret Nazi Expeditions: Into the Mountains (Tibet)

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: Korean Air Flight 801 crashes five km short of its destination. More than 200 people on board are killed. The crash is the beginning of a crusade for one passenger determined to make air travel safer.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: Gite owners in France face plumbing problems for their first guests. A Buckinghamshire couple’s bid to buy their dream home hits problems. And two Bristol caterers face a colossal cooking challenge.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A catering couple from Bristol face a plumbing crisis. In France, a major swimming pool leak hits two expats’ holiday apartment business. And a Buckinghamshire couple’s bid to impress a VIP guest at their holiday cycling business suffers a setback.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A major leak threatens to drain much-needed finances from two expats’ holiday apartment business. In Spain, a Buckinghamshire couple’s cycling holiday venture hits the skids. And in France, a Yorkshire can-can dancer teaches her amateur troupe.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A Buckinghamshire couple face a battle to boost bookings for their cycling business. In France, a Yorkshire dancer prepares her amateur troupe for their first public performance. And a couple tackle rising costs as they race to open their bed & breakfast.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: Foodies from Warwick have grand plans to start cooking holidays in rural France, three generations of a family from Kent open a French campsite, and a couple from Brighton run holiday lets in rural Spain.

programme.title: Alive

programme.title: Trapped

programme.title: Trapped
programme.desc: A cargo ship suffers engine failure. With a storm approaching, can the Canadian Coast Guard rescue the crew?

programme.title: Avalanche: Man Versus Earth

programme.title: China Quake

programme.title: Storm Hawks
programme.desc: Repton and his cronies decide to heat things up on the icy Terra Blizzaris. But even working together with the wild and crazy Absolute Zeroes, the Storm Hawks may be headed for a meltdown.

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: Tony returns to Earth through the Naroomi vortex relic in order to find the Core Dreamstone, while Edyn, Strag and the Magi Resistance Force battle Agram on the drained seabed of Orothe.

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: When the Final Hyren quest lands the kids in Bograth, they discover the strange, swamp-laden realm. The rampant void energy poisoning the swamp has changed the Bograthians - and their Guardian Hyren - into mutated, rat-like creatures.

programme.title: Kung Fu Dino Posse
programme.desc: When Skor discovers a crystal hidden in the Extreme Fighting Championship Belt, he devises a plan to get it. Since only humans are allowed to compete, he tricks Edgar into becoming his protégé.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: It's a Headless Horse, Man / Voyage to the Bottom of the Deep
programme.desc: McGee is thrilled when he wins a mounted horse head.

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: The Final Dreamers travel to Nar, where Edyn is to study with a peculiar spellcaster named Ust while Tony and Strag battle an old foe, Sikan, to find their way to the Guardian Hyren of Nar. Ust's different ways of thinking end up helping to their quest.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Link to the Future
programme.desc: Varis is on the verge of victory unless Playmaker can make one last play to stop him!

programme.title: Street Sharks
programme.desc: The Street Sharks' geneticist father, DR. BOLTON, discovers his jealous but brilliant colleague, DR. PARADIGM, is using Bolton's recombinant DNA discoveries to create a new, more powerful species.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: S.P.U.D.S / Monster Hunters "R" Us
programme.desc: McGee, Gretchen and Squirt disturb the potato King!

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: With both the Moonlands Diamond and Orwin's staff in their hands, the Final Dreamers still can't figure out how to merge them into the Realm's Honor staff, the relic used to magine the Final Hyren.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ learns that having a pet is a bigger responsibility than he expected when he takes care of a friend’s dog. When Baby Bop’s favorite teddy bear is torn, she wants to take him to the vet for help.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Butterflies - Nature Of Things
programme.desc: Baby Bop is sad because she lost her pet caterpillar, Monty. Barney and the others try to help her find it. Baby Bop is surprised to discover Monty inside a chrysalis. Everyone is excited to find Monty—now a beautiful butterfly!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Once Upon a Fairy Tale
programme.desc: Mario is trying to write his very own fairy tale. The children help by acting out some of their favorite fairy tales to give Mario some ideas.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Playing Games - No, No, No!
programme.desc: Baby Bop has trouble following the rules and taking turns while playing games. Barney and Riff help her learn how to follow the rules. In the end, Baby Bop and BJ have fun playing together, and Baby Bop learns that rules make games fun for everyone!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Gift Of The Dinos - Winter
programme.desc: It's Christmas and BJ dreams of getting a new baseball glove to go with his baseball, while Riff hopes for new drumsticks to use his drum. Barney reminds them that Christmas is more than just getting gifts and helps them learn the meaning of Christmas.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: The Park Kids decide to have a Dog Show to show off their pets. A rainy day has everyone stuck in the Caboose. Barney suggests fun activities.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: The Big Garden - Get Happy
programme.desc: Baby Bop wants Barney, BJ and the kids to play with her instead of working in their garden. They promise to play with her as soon as they finish. Baby Bop can't wait, and tries many ways to get them to come play with her now, none of which work.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Sharing Is Caring!
programme.desc: The children bring toys to donate to Mr. Boyd's toy drive. Baby Bop and BJ arrive and after some convincing, Baby Bop learns about the merits of sharing.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Play Piano With Me!
programme.desc: The children learn all about the piano when they play games, listen to real pianos and even play a little themselves.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Split-Second

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Carter the Enforcer

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Return of Dregg
programme.desc: While the Turtles work on using fragments of the Vortex Crystal to stabilize their mutations, Lord Dregg plans to use the fragments to create another Vortex Crystal to power his Vortex Transporter.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Beginning of the End
programme.desc: While Raphael, Michelangelo, Donatello and Carter work on restoring Leonardo to his regular self, Mung steals all the plutonium from a power plant in order for Dregg to build a Plutonium Ray to turn Leonardo into a radioactive killer.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Power of Three
programme.desc: Mungg informs Dregg that he came across two individuals who claimed they were old acquaintances of the turtles: Shredder and Krang!

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): A Turtle in Time
programme.desc: The Turtles', Shredder's and Krang's battles skills, powers, and memories are absorbed into Dregg.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Turtles to the Second Power
programme.desc: Dregg and his crew plan an invasion of Earth to make it his new home base, but first he has to get his transporter chip back from Shredder.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Day the Earth Disappeared
programme.desc: With the city breaking apart, the Turtles head to the street to investigate and see the Dreggnaut appear in the sky. With Mung's help, Dregg reprograms the transporter to open a warp in space.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Divide and Conquer
programme.desc: Lord Dregg launches a final attack on the Ninja Turtles.

programme.title: Total Drama Action
programme.desc: The new contestants arrive to compete against each other in movie-themed challenges for a variety of rewards. Who will win the first one and get the pick of the trailers?

programme.title: Total Drama Action
programme.desc: The cast think they've been set an easy challenge to find hidden alien eggs around the set - that is until Mama Alien starts hunting them down.

programme.title: Total Drama Action
programme.desc: The cast is put into two teams, Gwen's team, the Screaming Gaffers and Trent's, the Killer Grips. Which team will succeed in today's gruelling challenges?

programme.title: Total Drama Action
programme.desc: The two teams must compete in a surfing contest to see who can stay on the board the longest, but things heat up in the water when the sharks return.

programme.title: Total Drama Action

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Alarmed by Zamasu's sudden appearance, Goku begins to fight him, but Goku Black meddles in the skirmish which prompts other fighters to come to Goku's defence.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Back in the present, Goku, Vegeta and Future Trunks recuperate while Beerus and Whis theorize on Goku Black's origins; with sinister thoughts on his mind, Zamasu pressures Zuno to tell him about the Super Dragon Balls.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Supreme Kai Gowasu is in grave danger. Now that gods are involved, Zamasu's treachery isn't a mortal matter any more and Beerus will have to take matters into his own hands.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Beerus is convinced that his actions should have influenced the future, but Future Trunks isn't so sure. Goku, Vegeta, and Future Trunks must see it for themselves.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Goku and his friends confront Goku Black and Zamasu in the future. Black reveals that he is actually the present-day Zamasu, who used the Super Dragon Balls to switch bodies with Goku.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Fighting rages on and things are looking grim for the heroes, they might not be able to win, but Future Trunks can at least defend the others while they escape.

programme.title: Pokemon: Advanced Battle
programme.desc: When Ash's Treecko and Corphish face Grovyle and Slugma in a Double Battle, Treecko turns the tables, learning to use Bullet Seed.

programme.title: Pokemon: Advanced Battle
programme.desc: A Trainer learns that Pokémon battling requires more than tactics and technology. Meanwhile, a Bagon dreams the impossible dream of taking flight.

programme.title: Pokemon: Advanced Battle
programme.desc: An invitation to the Togepi Festival brings Misty to the Hoenn region, where she learns that a local kingdom bases its rule on the whims of passing Togepi.

programme.title: Pokemon: Advanced Battle
programme.desc: Our heroes go up against an evil regent who would use Misty's Togepi to steal the throne from its rightful heir!

programme.title: Pokemon: Advanced Battle

programme.title: Pokemon: Advanced Battle
programme.desc: Our heroes discover a love story between two Trainers who star with their Pokémon in a local dance festival.

programme.title: Pokemon: Advanced Battle

programme.title: Pokemon: Advanced Battle

programme.title: Pokemon: Advanced Battle

programme.title: Pokemon: Advanced Battle

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children go for a ride on a Sea Tractor. Po goes for a ride on her scooter, while she’s riding she sees Laa-Laa’s ball, Dipsy’s hat and Tinky Winky’s bag. They’ve left them all behind!

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Tubbies play a bumping bottoms game. They stop to watch some children play some ball games. Laa-Laa’s ball goes in a puddle, she tries to get it back but can’t reach it.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children go on a boat trip to see some seals. Tinky Winky is wondering what everyone is doing.

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Teletubbies love dancing, but they love children even more. So everything stops when they watch some children painting in a most unusual way. Back at the house, a trail leads Tinky Winky all around Teletubbyland to find out.

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children playing with torches. In Teletubbyland, Po chases Tinky Winky, and Po catches him.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: The heaviest judgments of convicted killers are reserved for those who committed premeditated murder. These women plot and plan. They know the consequences of their actions, but still they go forward to kill.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Love Gone Wrong
programme.desc: Love can be beautiful, love can be blind and love can be deadly. Desire and jealousy are powerful forces driving women to dark and horrifying places in their minds.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Teen Killers
programme.desc: They were too young to drink or vote but they were not too young to commit the most brutal of crimes. Some were driven by pure curiosity: how would it feel to take a life?

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Behind lace-curtained windows and beneath sensible haircuts lurked evil. Appearances were deceptive. We did not notice these female killers walking by. These women wore a mask of sanity.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: A rifle in a shopping mall, a syringe of potassium chloride and a syringe of insulin, each in the hands of a mentally disturbed woman, lead to the tragic end of many lives.

programme.title: The FBI Files: No Remorse

programme.title: The FBI Files: Betrayed

programme.title: The FBI Files: Terror In Disguise

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Paradise
programme.desc: It should have been Shangri-La, but when bad blood developed, piracy took over and the only law was the law of the jungle.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Collateral Damage

programme.title: Happily Never After
programme.desc: Teresa and Rob, about to be married, are gunned down in the street. While Teresa does not survive the attack, Rob manages to escape with a severely injured leg.

programme.title: Happily Never After
programme.desc: Eddie and Tyler live a seemingly perfectly happy life until a deadly break-in. Now police must shift through a tangled web of lies to find the killer.

programme.title: Happily Never After
programme.desc: When detectives investigate suspicious activities at the home of newlyweds Omima and Bill they find dismembered limbs and bags of entrails. Who do they belong to?

programme.title: Happily Never After
programme.desc: When Oscar waltzes into Vic's life, they both know it's forever. But soon death finds its way into the couple's life and police must bring a killer to justice.

programme.title: Happily Never After
programme.desc: Orphans Diane and Kevin find peace when they wed but this happiness doesn't last. Everything shatters when a body is found dismembered in the snow. Police struggle to uncover an obsession.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Crimes Of Passion
programme.desc: When killers are driven by jealousy and desire, their desperation is evident in both the crime and their efforts to avoid detection. But forensic science can reveal even the slightest mistake to solve crimes of passion.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Council pt. 1
programme.desc: Jim Phelps leads the IMF on an assignment to destroy the syndicate, a criminal empire headed by Frank Wayne.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Council pt. 2
programme.desc: The IMF continues its fight against organized crime.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Astrologer
programme.desc: The IMF accepts a critical mission to rescue Nikolai Kurzon, the leader-in-exile of the Baltic state of Veyska who has been kidnapped by Col. Stahl (Steve Ihnat), head of the secret police.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Echo of Yesterday
programme.desc: The resurgence of neo-Nazism in Germany takes the IMF to Bavaria, where Marcus von Frank (Hans Gudegast) threatens to become a second Hitler.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Photographer
programme.desc: The imagination of the IMF is put to the test when a massive spy ring in the U.S. headed by fashion photographer, David Redding, threatens to cripple the country with a deadly pneumonic plague.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Miami Heat
programme.desc: All-terrain Air Commander Hovercraft, a 1970s NASA countdown clock and a one-of-a-kind 1960s Delta Relay rocket.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Shuffle
programme.desc: Ton and Allen teach a cocky new auction hunter a lesson. They spot a 1940's-era shuffleboard table and uncover an early hot rod made from the fuel tank of a WWII fighter plane!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Betsy's Last Stand
programme.desc: With their beloved bread truck on life support, Ton and Allen head to an auction to help save her. Will an industrial grinder and a classic Chevy be enough to mend Betsy, or will the guys be forced to say goodbye for good?

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Allen's Big Crush
programme.desc: The guys battle it out with their fierce former-employee, while a shill bidder threatens to ruin the day. When all hope seems lost, a set of monster truck tires and a mystery box are their last chance to come out on top.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sink or Swim
programme.desc: 1905 Hand-crank Thomas Edison gramophone with cylindrical records; a discontinued Addictor 190 Mini Boat; a rare 1897 Regina music box.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Carnies & Armories
programme.desc: A tough group of bidders team up to take down Ton and Allen at auction. After a couple of wins, the guys try to sell an arsenal used by Native Americans and some vintage carnival gear. But will they get conned?

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Mr. Haff Goes to Washington
programme.desc: Ton and Allen invade the Nation's capital, but meet strong resistance from local bidders. The guys uncover a Civil War era black powder revolver and a stash of South African gold coins!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: It's Raining Ton
programme.desc: The guys take Big Sis to her first auction - and when things get ugly, she becomes their secret weapon. Ton tests out a "blob" and Allen gets shot with a riot gun.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Money Makin' Monster Machines
programme.desc: The Auction Hunters team goes on the attack & ends up on a collision course with a hardened veteran auction buyer. They uncover a collection of speedy off-road vehicles and some hardcore heavy metal from the turn-of the-century!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Auction Hunters, Ink.
programme.desc: Autographed 1960s Bob Shaw Swing Gate tattoo machine; Terry Ives competition 22hp chainsaw; six foot chainsaw-carved cedar bear.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Big Score
programme.desc: At a climate-controlled storage facility in downtown L.A., Allen and Ton's locker wins score them an antique cash register and a German H&K pistol prized by collectors.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Within These Walls
programme.desc: Meet people who get more than they bargained for when they buy haunted homes.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Kids Under Attack
programme.desc: Watch a boy encounter a terrifying being, and an imaginary friend turns evil.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: When Spirits Take Over
programme.desc: Meet a possessed young woman and visit a spell-bound boutique.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Possessed
programme.desc: A teen’s risky ghost fixation grows, while a war vet almost destroys a family.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Family Phantoms
programme.desc: Meet the ghosts of a mother and aunt who make life difficult for the living.

programme.title: A Haunting: Back From The Grave

programme.title: A Haunting: The Presence
programme.desc: Sarah Miller believes that something supernatural in her home is terrorizing her children.

programme.title: A Haunting: Portal Of Doom
programme.desc: Anita Intenzo and her son, Chris, encounter the ghost of their recently deceased friend Paul while preparing his house to be sold. Paul warns of a demon attached to an artifact he acquired abroad. The demon invades Anita’s home and all hell breaks loose.

programme.title: A Haunting: Nightmare In Bridgeport
programme.desc: Connecticut child safety specialist Bob Baker has devoted his life to protecting children from natural and supernatural harm. When his mother starts hearing voices in his childhood home, Bob is faced with a demon that evolves from his own nightmares.

programme.title: A Haunting: Games of Lies
programme.desc: In 2012, Olivia and Jesse Barbour move into their dream home with five-year-old daughter Marie. Soon after, Marie makes her first friend in the neighborhood, a boy named Jackson. Olivia is thrilled until she realizes Jackson is really an imaginary friend.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: When a single mother with a history of heart problems is found dead, detectives assume she died of natural causes. But as the investigation deepens, detectives begin to believe foul play was involved.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: Devoted mother Heather Strong disappears, leaving her estranged husband Josh to care for her two children, as he also falls under suspicion.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: After the naked body of an Ohio State senior is found, investigators bring in a suspect for questioning. They play a dangerous game of give and take, hoping to get the truth and bring justice to the victim and her family.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: After an elderly woman comes into a large sum of money, she is attacked. Investigators soon uncover a twisted tale of addiction, brutality and betrayal.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: When Kim Allen is found murdered in her home, her estranged and abusive husband is the likely suspect. A risky bluff by detectives takes the case in a surprising direction.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: When a schoolteacher is gunned down in public, a known felon's DNA and phone records link him to the crime. After investigators arrest the man, they discover the real killer might actually be someone else entirely.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 8

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 9

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 10
programme.desc: Our heroes' friendship is tested when they meet Jet, a charismatic teenager leading a band of rebels who are fighting against the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 11
programme.desc: When Aang and friends come to the rim of a giant canyon, they are asked to help guide two groups of refugees across. Aang quickly learns that this will be no easy task.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 12

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 13

programme.desc: Aang, Katara, and Sokka discover a village of people who are all reliant on a fortuneteller in their everyday lives but they are so reliant that they are blind to the imminent danger they are all in.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Pen-Y-Lan House

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Bron-Y-Garth Hospital Pt1
programme.desc: Stuart ventures into Bron-Y-Garth, an old workhouse and abandoned hospital. The spirits that reside here are said to be plentiful, something Stuart finds out all to soon.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Bron-Y-Garth Hospital Pt2
programme.desc: Karl takes on the formidable cell block of Bron-Y-Garth, a former workhouse and abandoned hospital. The dark corridors are said to house many an aggressive entity, and soon Karl finds out first-hand what it they capable of in a climactic end.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Doncaster Air Museum Pt1
programme.desc: The famous Air Museum in Doncaster houses many an artefact of aviation history and many spirit from its past. Karl investigates one of the huts that is said to be full of paranormal happenings, and he isn’t disappointed.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Doncaster Air Museum Pt2

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Nunnington Hall Pt1

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Nunnington Hall Pt2

programme.title: The Yellow Couch with Jeremy Lynch - Kaya Scodelario
programme.desc: She became a household name at just 14years old, when she burst onto our screens in the groundbreaking series Skins. Since then, she’s pursued her acting dreams all the way to Hollywood — and built quite an impressive career.

programme.title: The Yellow Couch with Jeremy Lynch - Ross Kemp
programme.desc: A courageous man who's living proof you can reinvent yourself more times than a Love Island contestant. He went from pulling pints in the Queen Vic to pulling BAFTAs for documentaries…

programme.title: The Yellow Couch with Jeremy Lynch - Patrice Evra
programme.desc: Today, we’ve got a guest who has lived several lives in one. On the pitch, he was a fierce left-back who collected trophies like kids collect Pokémon cards. Off the pitch, he’s become the man of Monday mornings.

programme.title: The Yellow Couch with Jeremy Lynch - Ben Whittaker
programme.desc: A guest who has a huge drive and work ethics and has overcome some hurdles that have possibly made him stronger. His entrances make Harry Styles look underdressed at Coachella.

programme.desc: When a young woman goes missing on Valentine’s Day, detectives turn to a pollen expert, who pieces together fragments of evidence to find her body.

programme.title: Murdertown: Dartford

programme.title: Murdertown: Dundee

programme.title: Murdertown: Pontypridd
programme.desc: In 2014, a woman goes missing after a night drinking in the local pubs. CCTV finds her walking home arm in arm with another drinker. He just happens to be a former butcher. Police soon realise he has put his trade to use by dismembering his victim.

programme.title: Murdertown: Tamworth
programme.desc: In 1994, a gang kill a woman who manages a building society and tie up her husband, before robbing the building society of large sums of cash. But despite making a tearful plea for help, the injured husband’s story doesn’t tally.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Debbie Griggs had three young kids, and was pregnant with her fourth. But she believed husband Andrew was sleeping with a teenage girl, and had threatened divorce. That’s when she went missing, and it would take cops 20 years to uncover the truth.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Glenna and Marty Duram’s marriage was always volatile. They argued about money and Glenna’s gambling habit. Jokes about killing one another barely raised an eyebrow - until the day Marty was actually found dead.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: When Adrian and Jane Goldsmith met they were both hoping for a second chance of happiness; someone to grow old with. But police officer Adrian was a troubled man, plagued by paranoia and dark imaginings.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Sophie and Martin Cavanagh had a fairytale wedding. Sophie worked hard to give the family a better life, but Martin’s jealousy drove the couple apart, and he went to desperate lengths to stop her finding love elsewhere.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Manling Tsang and Neal Williams were youngsters who fell into marriage in a hurry. Neither was well prepared for parenthood or the responsibilities of adult life. Manling planned to rid herself of her young family in a scheme of breathtaking cruelty.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Alice Farquharson was the centre of her family. Her husband Keith was a police officer with a chequered history of misogyny and extramarital affairs. When Alice unexpectedly died, her family and police were shocked to discover the cause.

programme.title: Someone They Knew
programme.desc: What begins as another sun-soaked day in Boca Raton, ends in blood-soaked violence, leaving a mother of three a quadriplegic.

programme.title: Someone They Knew
programme.desc: Mark Richards had been paralyzed in a car accident. His live-in caregiver, Gloria Guzman, had also been his wife. When she called 911 to report that Richards had drowned in his bath, paramedics were suspicious.

programme.title: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell - Season 1 - Episode 112
programme.desc: Cari Farver vanished in Omaha, and texts claimed she’d moved away. Years later, police discovered Liz Golyar, jealous of Cari’s new romance, had impersonated her and murdered her. Golyar was charged, though Cari’s body was never found.

programme.title: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell - Season 1 - Episode 011
programme.desc: When schoolteacher Genai Coleman was found murdered in a parking lot, detectives struggled to find answers. A crucial DNA match from her car led to the killer—someone no one expected.

programme.title: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell - Season 1 - Episode 044
programme.desc: Murder of Breezy Otteson and Riley Powell – Two Utah teens vanished, sparking a four-month search that ended with their bodies found in an abandoned mine shaft.

programme.title: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell: Crime Exposé with Nancy O'Dell - Season 1 - Episode 105
